profile.name: Sindhuri Alugolu
profile.subtitle: Soft Skills Trainer | Communication Specialist
profile.title: Soft Skills Trainer · Communication Specialist
profile.heroBio: Empowering learners across hospitality, aviation, corporate, and academic sectors through engaging communication training, curriculum design, and workplace readiness programs.
profile.contactCTA: Open to corporate training, guest faculty roles, curriculum consulting, and workshop facilitation.

summary: Dedicated Soft Skills Trainer and freelance content creator with extensive experience training learners across hospitality, aviation, IT, and corporate sectors. Skilled in curriculum design, webinar facilitation, and delivering engaging programs focused on communication, interpersonal skills, and professional development to enhance employability and personal growth. Proven contribution to community development through impactful CSR initiatives, government college workshops, and corporate training programs.

about.label: About Me
about.heading: Transforming Communication, Building Confidence
paragraphs: Dedicated Soft Skills Trainer and freelance content creator with extensive experience training learners across hospitality, aviation, IT, and corporate sectors. Skilled in curriculum design, webinar facilitation, and delivering engaging programs focused on communication, interpersonal skills, and professional development.

Proven contribution to community development through impactful CSR initiatives, government college workshops under PM-USHA GIEI Scheme, and corporate training programs. A sanguine and adaptable professional with a passion for empowering others to reach their full potential.

experienceIntro: A decade of training excellence across corporate, academic, and community settings.

experience.title: Consultant — Soft Skills & Training | Learnet Skills Limited
bullets: Engaged as consultant on contract basis at AP Common, Andhra Pradesh.
Delivering soft skills, IT skills, and employability training aligned with Learnet Skills programs.
Supporting learner grooming, interview preparation, teamwork, and group discussion activities.

experience.title: Freelancer — Content Creation & Curriculum Design | Vasishta 360 Channel
bullets: Curated engaging English language curriculums for diverse learner groups, focusing on vocabulary building and communication skills.
Conceptualized and conducted interactive webinars on vocabulary enhancement and effective communication.
Created video content on vocabulary, leveraging storytelling and real-life examples to simplify complex concepts.
Collaborated with the team to develop impactful learning resources, boosting learner engagement and retention.

experience.title: English Language cum Soft Skills Trainer | CMS Labs (Crystal Management Services) & SDI
bullets: Impart English language skills to pupils registered under the Skill Development Institute (SDI) collaboration project.
Integrated soft skills training as a key employability factor, training beneficiaries on industry-relevant interpersonal and workplace skills.
Develop and conduct soft skills training programs for students from various engineering and degree colleges.
Implement CSR programs sponsored by CRPF-230 Battalion and mentor students in communication, teamwork, and professional etiquette.

experience.title: Consultant Faculty — Etiquette Trainer | Sumedha Hotel Management & Aviation
bullets: Served as consultant and guest faculty for hotel management and aviation colleges across multiple institutions.
Designed and conducted industry-relevant etiquette and soft skills programs for hospitality and aviation sectors.
Focused on customer service, leadership, professional etiquette, and confident self-presentation.

experience.title: Consultant — Communication & Soft Skills Trainer | ShriG's (Dockyard Training Programs)
bullets: Delivered specialized communication and soft skills training for dockyard employees under programs owned by ShriG's.
Customized training methodologies for a high-performance, technical work environment.
Conducted dockyard training programs focused on workplace readiness and professional communication.

experience.title: Manager | Libonji Creations, Chingola, Zambia
bullets: Managed operations, employee relations, and compliance at a recreational center.
Designed and conducted training workshops for employees.

experience.title: Consultant Facilitator - Soft Skills | Society of Indo-German Institute of Advanced Technology, Visakhapatnam
bullets: Facilitated training sessions on communication skills, interview techniques, and corporate etiquette.

experience.title: Communication & Soft Skills Trainer | Bhagavatula Charitable Trust, Visakhapatnam
bullets: Delivered soft skills training across three SMART centers.
Spearheaded placement-linked training initiatives under Tech Mahindra Foundation's CSR projects.

experience.title: Soft Skills Facilitator | Vision Software Solutions
bullets: Conducted soft skills workshops for government-sponsored projects.

experience.title: Communication & Soft Skills Trainer | Society of Indo-German Institute of Advanced Technology
bullets: Provided employment readiness training under Tech Mahindra Foundation's CSR initiatives.

projects.intro: Government college workshops, CRPF-sponsored placement-linked training, and CSR skill development programs through Crystal Management Services (CMS Skill Center).

jobDescription.title: Core Job Description — English Language cum Soft Skill Trainer
items: Impart English language skills to registered learners and integrate soft skills that enhance employability.
Train beneficiaries on industry-relevant soft skills across diverse domains.

Handle day-to-day project operations: coordination with mobilizers, counselling, interviewing, motivation, retention, training calendar preparation, batch formation, and progress monitoring via assessments.
Deliver Workplace Readiness (WPR) and hand over trained candidates to the placement team.
Manage communication and correspondence with institutional heads; maintain MIS deployed on Tech Mahindra's server.
Attend yearly TMF conferences for Training of Trainers (TOT), collaborate with trainers pan-India, contribute to curriculum updates, and support implementation.

education.school: Aditya College of Engineering & Information Technology, JNTU Kakinada

achievements: Featured in newspapers for impactful training sessions on interview skills and personality development.
Recognized for effective business communication training and email etiquette.
Received appreciation for animal welfare and environmental awareness campaigns.
Selected for interview panels to assess candidates for soft skills trainer positions.
Active mentor and volunteer in community training and education programs.
extracurricular: Active animal rights activist & rescuer (Volunteer at VSPCA).
Social service participation & leadership in training initiatives.
Published writer (short tales, quotes, and social articles).
Cultural event participation & public speaking competitions.

personalSnapshot.personality: A sanguine and buoyant individual with a positive outlook toward challenges and opportunities. My agnostic approach enables adaptability to new ideas and perspectives, helping me navigate complex situations with an open mind.

declaration.text: I hereby declare that the information provided above is accurate and true to the best of my knowledge.
